texto: I would expect illegal alien parents to take care of their children. If it means the kids go back home with them, that's what happens. If it means there are legal relatives in the United States that can take care of them, that can happen to. But I believe it's the parents responsibility to take care of the kids.

texto: We don't have the money in America to keep paying for the education of everybody else's children from around the world. We simply don't have the financial resources to do that.
